executives.name: Brock Colterjohn
executives.background: Mr. Colterjohn has over 10 years of experience in the mining industry, including roles in corporate development and investor relations. He was previously with HighGold Mining Inc. and has a background in capital markets.

executives.name: Aris Morfopoulos
executives.background: Mr. Morfopoulos is a senior executive with over 30 years of experience in corporate management and finance. He has served as a director and officer for several public companies in the resource sector.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Nicole Brewster
executives.background: Ms. Brewster is the President and CEO of Canadian Silver Hunter Inc. and has extensive experience in mineral exploration and project management.

board_of_directors.name: Darwin Green
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Green is the President and CEO of HighGold Mining Inc. and has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in exploration and project development.

board_of_directors.name: Brock Colterjohn
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Colterjohn has over 10 years of experience in the mining industry, including roles in corporate development and investor relations.

board_of_directors.name: Ian Slater
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Slater is an entrepreneur with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. He is the founder and Chairman of Libero Copper & Gold Corp.

board_of_directors.name: Michael Gray
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gray is a co-founder of Agentis Capital Mining Partners and has over 30 years of experience in the mining sector, including equity research and corporate development.

sources.source_description: Company Website - Management and Directors Page
